//_samd: SaMD {{SAMD_CLASS}} requires demonstrable verification (IEC 62304 5.7). Mutation score is the proof that tests assert behavior, not just render.
//_ignoreStatic: Do NOT mutate static constants (literals computed once at module load). Mutating them wastes the bulk of the run on unreachable/equivalent mutants.
//_incremental: Reuse prior results; only re-test mutants in changed files. Keep .stryker-tmp/incremental.json out of source control churn but cached in CI.
//_coverageAnalysis: perTest maps each test to the code it covers so only relevant tests run per mutant. Largest single speedup.
//_timeouts: The full suite needs a generous dry-run window or it aborts before the baseline finishes.
//_concurrency: Tune to (nproc - 4) on the runner. Comment left for the operator; uncomment to pin.
//_thresholds: break is the CI gate: score below it fails the build. high/low only color the report.
